text: - i. (Division 26) Electrical - All panelboards, switch gear, transformers, conduit, cable trays, bus duct, light fixtures, and required clearances including 'no fly zones' above equipment. Inclusive of all pull/junction boxes, hangers and supports, accessor ies, equipment, fixtures, cast-in floor boxes and clearances as required for maintenance and code compliance. Required access panels shall also be modeled.
